phrases.example: To give you some context, we were already late.
All of a sudden, the lights went out.
What happened was the system crashed.
In the end, we found a simple fix.
The best part was meeting new people.
Honestly, I didn’t expect it to be so crowded.
Looking back, it was a good lesson.
If I’m honest, I was a bit nervous.
The main takeaway was to double-check details.
